data.title: Signing Day Sports Announces Major AI Data Center LOI
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Signing Day Sports, Inc. ( (SGN) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On March 13, 2026, Signing Day Sports announced that affiliate One Blockchain LLC signed a non-binding letter of intent with an international private equity firm for a build-to-suit data center lease aimed at next-generation AI and high-performance computing workloads. The proposed facility is expected to support about 5 MW of IT capacity in a purpose-built core-and-shell building, underscoring BlockchAIn’s focus on scalable, power-advantaged AI infrastructure.

BlockchAIn believes the project could exceed $100 million in total contract value over an initial 10-year lease term, with potential to reach roughly $300 million if two seven-year renewal options are exercised, though final terms remain subject to a definitive agreement. The LOI comes as BlockchAIn prepares to complete its business combination with Signing Day Sports on March 16, 2026 and list BlockchAIn Digital Infrastructure, Inc. on the NYSE American under the ticker “AIB,” positioning the combined platform to capitalize on accelerating demand for AI-ready data center capacity.

BlockchAIn’s existing 40 MW South Carolina campus, which produced solid revenue and net income in 2024, provides an operational base for this expansion and illustrates the economics the company aims to replicate across new sites. For investors and other stakeholders, the move signals an effort to scale a modular, power-first infrastructure model that targets one of the tightest bottlenecks in the AI and HPC ecosystem: access to power and rapid deployment of specialized compute capacity.

The most recent analyst rating on (SGN) stock is a Hold with a $0.21 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Signing Day Sports, Inc. stock, see the SGN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SGN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SGN is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by weak financial fundamentals (losses, negative equity, and negative free cash flow) and bearish technical trend signals (below major moving averages with negative MACD). These are partially offset by positive, potentially transformational corporate events tied to the pending business combination and recent financing.

To see Spark’s full report on SGN stock, click here.

More about Signing Day Sports, Inc.

Signing Day Sports, Inc. operates in the sports recruitment technology industry, offering a mobile app and digital platform that help student-athletes build verified recruiting profiles for college coaches. Users can upload video-verified measurables, academic records, and technical skill videos, targeting the U.S. collegiate athletics recruiting market.

One Blockchain LLC, an affiliate in a pending business combination with Signing Day Sports, develops and operates digital infrastructure for high-performance computing and AI hosting. Its platform focuses on power-first, modular data center developments, anchored by a 40 MW data center campus in South Carolina that generated about $22.9 million in revenue and $5.7 million in net income in 2024.

Average Trading Volume: 48,892,879

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $25.72M

For an in-depth examination of SGN stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: IonQ Merger Could Weaken Former SkyWater Investors’ Rights and Governance Protections
data.description:
Skywater Technology Inc (SKYT) has disclosed a new risk, in the Share Price & Shareholder Rights category.

Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Following the IonQ mergers, SkyWater Technology Inc. investors would no longer hold SkyWater shares, but instead become shareholders of IonQ, Inc. This transition exposes them to a different corporate governance regime, as their rights will be determined by IonQ’s certificate of incorporation and bylaws, which may provide materially different protections and privileges.

This change in governing documents could alter voting power, approval thresholds for major transactions, or shareholder recourse in disputes. From an external risk perspective, any unfavorable divergence from SkyWater’s current shareholder rights framework could reduce investor influence and potentially diminish perceived value or protection for former SkyWater stockholders.

Overall, Wall Street has a Hold consensus rating on SKYT stock based on 5 Holds.

data.description:

  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

First Internet Bancorp’s revenue is sensitive to assumptions underpinning gains on sales of U.S. government guaranteed loans and related servicing assets. If estimates of retained unguaranteed loan values, servicing rights, or deferred origination costs prove inaccurate, reported revenue and profitability could be materially misstated.

This exposes investors to the risk that the firm’s reported performance and financial condition could differ significantly from its underlying economic reality.
